_description: Residual cascade + dual-domain (detach) — Stage 0 U-Net [32,64,128,256] + Stage 1 ResUNet [32,64,128,256] with 3-channel input (Stage-0 output, Hann FBP, SIRT). Stage 1 now uses 4-level features (previously 5-level, confounding depth with the extra priors). This is the full proposed method. Against the plain residual cascade it isolates the contribution of the sinogram-domain priors; against the large naive cascade it supports the thesis claim that improvement is architectural, not from capacity.
